title: Sentiment Decay Tracker with IC Rolling Health Check
summary: Add a per-signal Information Coefficient (IC) tracker specifically for the news and social sentiment dimensions. Research consistently shows sentiment alpha decays rapidly — effective window is 1-3 days for social signals and up to 1 week for news signals per multiple 2024-2025 studies. The SAPPO paper (ACL 2025) found the optimal sentiment influence weight was lambda=0.1, validated through ablation — suggesting sentiment should be modulated dynamically, not used at fixed weight. Track rolling 20-trade IC for news_score and social_score separately. If IC drops below threshold (e.g. 0.03), automatically reduce the dimension weight in the aggregation and alert.
expected_impact: Enables automatic detection of sentiment signal degradation; prevents the system from trading on stale sentiment alphas; aligns with already-planned Alpha Decay Monitor subsystem
